title: NEON HORIZON
description: A cyberpunk heist thriller set in 2089. One crew. One shot. The future is theirs to steal.
long_description: In the sprawling megacity of New Meridian, a rogue AI known only as NEON has gone dark — taking with it the identities of 12 million citizens. Former soldier Zara Vex assembles the most unlikely crew in the city's underworld to pull off the impossible: infiltrate the city's central neural hub and bring NEON back online before the clock runs out. What follows is 128 minutes of high-octane action, mind-bending twists, and a visceral exploration of what it means to be human in a world run by machines.
tagline: In the dark, only the neon survives.

custom_tabs.label: Behind the Scenes
custom_tabs.content: Go inside the world of NEON HORIZON with exclusive behind-the-scenes footage from the production team. Over 400 visual effects shots were created entirely in-house.

custom_tabs.label: Soundtrack
custom_tabs.content:
The original score by Luna Vex blends analog synths with orchestral strings for a sound unlike anything in cinema today.

Available now on all streaming platforms.
